content: This information changes frequently. Check before you travel on theTfL Go appor ourJourney Planner.
For planned service changes and information about rail replacement buses, seePlanned line closures and service changes.
For information about live disruptions affecting stations, lifts and escalators, visitStatus Updates.

table_matrix: Elizabeth line trains will not stop
Monday 6 until Wednesday 8 April Monday 4 until Wednesday 6 May Monday 1 until Wednesday 3 June Monday 29 June until Wednesday 1 July
Elizabeth line trains will not stop after 22:30

Replacement of escalators 4 and 5. These connect the Northern line platforms with the District and Circle line platforms While this work takes place, the walking route between these platforms will be closed. Please allow a little longer for your journey and follow the signs, which will direct you via an alternative walking route. Depending on your journey, this route may be via street level. To pay the correct fare, just touch out as you exit and touch back in again, as you re-enter.

No step-free access to/from the Waterloo & City line For a step-free journey FROM Bank to Waterloo: Enter via the Northern line ticket hall on Cannon Street, then change at London Bridge for the Jubilee line to Waterloo. For a step-free journey TO Bank from Waterloo: Use the Jubilee line between Waterloo and London Bridge, then change for the Northern line to Bank and exit via the Cannon Street ticket hall.

Eastbound trains will not stop. To start an eastbound District line journey, take a short walk to West Kensington station, or take a westbound train to Hammersmith and change there. To start an eastbound Piccadilly line journey, take a short walk to West Kensington station for the District line to Earl's Court and change there, or take a westbound train to Hammersmith and change there. To complete an eastbound journey at Barons Court, alight at West Kensington (from the District line) for a westbound train or a short walk via Barons Court Road, or at Earl's Court (from the Piccadilly line) for a westbound train.
Elizabeth line trains will not stop.
Monday 6 until Wednesday 8 April Monday 4 until Wednesday 6 May Monday 1 until Wednesday 3 June Monday 29 June until Wednesday 1 July
Elizabeth line trains will not stop after 22:30

The lifts at this station are owned and maintained by Network Rail . Service updates are available on the National Rail website . If you require step-free access at Harrow & Wealdstone, please use Journey Planner to check before you travel. If the lift you require is not in service, there may be a number of alternative routes. You may wish to speak to a travel advisor (0345 222 1234) to determine which is best for your particular journey.

No step-free access To start a southbound step-free journey from the station, take bus 83 to Golders Green. To start a northbound step-free journey from the station, take bus 186 to Colindale or bus 113 or 186 to Edgware. To complete a step-free journey at the station, alight at Colindale for bus 186, or at Golders Green for bus 83 to Hendon Central
Eastbound trains will not stop until 11:00

No step-free access to/from the eastbound Piccadilly line. To start a Piccadilly line journey from Hounslow East, take a westbound train to Hounslow West and change there for an eastbound train. For a step-free exit at Hounslow East from Heathrow or Hounslow West, continue to Osterley and return on a westbound service. Alternatively, take bus route 81, 203, H32 or H96 from stop A to nearby Hounslow Bus station.

Both lifts that serve the footbridge will be out of service If required, please take a train to Devons Road and return on a southbound service, or a train to All Saints and return on a northbound service
Station closed Use nearby Bow Road or Stepney Green stations

Replacement of escalators 4 and 5. These connect the District and Circle line platforms with the Northern line platforms While this work takes place, the walking route between these platforms will be closed. Please allow a little longer for your journey and follow the signs, which will direct you via an alternative walking route. Depending on your journey, this route may be via street level. To pay the correct fare, just touch out as you exit and touch back in again, as you re-enter.
Reduced escalator service between the mid-concourse and ticket hall
Reduced escalator service between the Circle and District lines and the Victoria line platforms One of the three escalators will be out of service while we replace the steps and escalator chain.
No step-free access to the southbound Southern Railway platform. For a step-free southbound Southern Railway service, take any train from platform 1 to Harrow & Wealdstone and change there
No lift service between the street and ticket hall Step-free access is still available by using the entrance/exit on Bridge Road.
Elizabeth line trains will not stop.
Monday 6 until Wednesday 8 April Monday 4 until Wednesday 6 May Monday 1 until Wednesday 3 June Monday 29 June until Wednesday 1 July
Elizabeth line trains will not stop after 22:30
Greens End entrance: No escalator service
No step-free access For step-free travel, please use the Elizabeth line station at Woolwich.
